description.ko: 빛이 희미해지고 현실이 VOID-3의 고요하고 거대한 엔진 주위로 굴절되는 우주 최고의 심연을 향한 탐사.
description.en: An exploration into the deepest reaches of the cosmos where light begins to fade and reality bends around the silent, ancient engine of VOID-3.

prompt: Cinematic wide shot of the VOID-3 vessel drifting through a colossal cosmic abyss, surrounded by swirling dark matter and faint bioluminescent nebulae, ethereal starlight filtering through a deep violet void, hyper-detailed textures, futuristic sci-fi aesthetic, 8k resolution, unreal engine 5 render, sense of overwhelming scale and silence.
